mapper.sql:
WHERE deleted = 0
AND (config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR config_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
id, config_key AS configKey, config_name AS configName, config_value AS configValue, remark, sort, status, builtin
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_config WHERE id = #{configId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
